title: Panel
description: Panel: An environmental object used to define planar surfaces of a space (e.g. Wall, Floor, Roof)

ExternalEdges.description: A collection of Environment Edge objects which defines the external boundary of the panel

Openings.description: A collection of cutouts or holes in a building surface/panel (e.g. Window, Door, Rooflight)

Construction.description: A construction object providing layer and material information for the panel

Type.description: The type of environmental surface (e.g. Wall, Floor, Roof). Use PanelType enum) PanelType: The type of environmental surface (e.g. Wall, Floor, Roof)

ConnectedSpaces.description: This is a list of space names for which the panel belongs to. For example, the same panel can be a ceiling for Room A while also being a floor for Room B

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
